item.title: Sen. Johnson to Newsmax: Dems Block SAVE America Act to 'Cheat' in Elections
item.description: Sen. Ron Johnson, R-Wis., told Newsmax on Thursday that Democrats are blocking the SAVE America Act because they "want to cheat" in U.S. elections. Ap...

item.title: Internal Email Shows ICE Struggling to Vet Recruits
item.description: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement is struggling to keep pace with vetting new hires during its historic recruitment push and is laying out a pr...

item.title: US Condemns Hamas After Video Shows Gunmen Threatening Gazans

item.title: Rubio: Iran Missile Threat to US 'Unsustainable'
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio called Iran's refusal to discuss its ballistic missile program a "big problem" and an "unsustainable threat" to the Ame...

item.title: Rep. Fine to Newsmax: Can't Take Cuba at Its Word on Deadly Boat Incident
item.description: The United States should not automatically believe what Cuba has to say following a deadly incident involving a Florida-registered speedboat and Cuban...
